---
title: "Plate-bound stimulation of NLCs (anti-CD3e +/- anti-NK1.1 + soluble anti-CD28)"
subtitle: "Abdullah Lab, IMMEI, University Hospital Bonn"
protocol_id: "PROT-NLC-STIM-001"
version: "v1.0"
description: "Simple 96-well plate-bound stimulation of sorted NLCs for 3 days followed by IL-2-driven expansion."
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    geometry: "margin=2cm"
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: false
---

**Protocol ID:** {< meta protocol_id >}  
**Version:** {< meta version >}  
**Author:** Dillon Corvino  
**Date:** 2026-03-02

# Purpose

To stimulate sorted NLCs in 96-well plates using plate-bound anti-CD3e and/or anti-NK1.1 with soluble anti-CD28, then transfer cells to uncoated wells for IL-2-driven expansion.

# Critical notes (read before starting)

- Use sterile technique throughout.
- Coat plates at 4 °C overnight for consistent binding.
- anti-CD28 is **soluble** (add in media; do not coat).
- After stimulation, transfer cells to **uncoated** wells to avoid continued plate-bound signaling.

# Working concentrations

## Stimulation phase (in culture)

| Reagent | Final concentration | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| anti-CD3e | 2 µg/mL | plate-bound |
| anti-NK1.1 | 10 µg/mL | plate-bound |
| anti-CD28 | 5 µg/mL | soluble (in media) |
| Mouse IL-2 | 1 ng/mL | during stimulation |

## Expansion phase (post-stimulation)

| Reagent | Final concentration | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| Mouse IL-2 | 100 IU/mL | in fresh complete T cell medium |

# Plate and seeding

- Plate type: 96-well **U-bottom** or **flat-bottom**
- Seeding density: **10,000–50,000 cells per well**
- Coating volume: **200 µL/well PBS** (sterile)

# Procedure

## Plate coating (Day -1)

1. Prepare coating solutions in **sterile PBS** (200 µL per well):  
   - anti-CD3e (as needed per condition)  
   - anti-NK1.1 (as needed per condition)  
   *(Do not include anti-CD28.)*
2. Add **200 µL** coating solution per well.
3. Incubate **overnight at 4 °C**.

## Stimulation (Day 0)

1. Remove coating solution.
2. Wash wells **2×** with **sterile PBS**.
3. Add cells in complete T cell medium, seeding **10–50K cells/well**.
4. Add soluble reagents to culture medium (per condition):  
   - anti-CD28 to **5 µg/mL**  
   - mouse IL-2 to **1 ng/mL**
5. Incubate **3 days** at 37 °C, 5% CO2.

## Transfer to expansion (Day 3 → Day 4)

1. Gently resuspend cells and transfer the full well contents to **uncoated** wells (new 96-well plate).
2. Culture in fresh complete T cell medium containing mouse IL-2 at **100 IU/mL**.

# Storage and stability

- Coated plates can be prepared the day before and kept at **4 °C overnight** until use.
- Prepare antibody working solutions fresh where possible.

# Safety

- Handle all primary cells and culture waste using appropriate biosafety procedures.
- Dispose of liquid waste containing cells as biohazardous waste.

# Version history

| Version | Date | Author | Changes |
|---|---|---|---|
| v1.0 | 2026-03-02 | Dillon Corvino | Initial simple stimulation protocol. |
